{{CargoClone
|name=Night Kitty
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=137
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +30
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
